allow: Bash(node -e "const ag = require\('ag-grid-community'\); const t = ag.themeQuartz; console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(t\)\).join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const ag = require\('ag-grid-community'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ag\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('part'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('css'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('theme'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const ag = require\('ag-grid-community'\); const p = ag.createPart\({ css: '.ag-row { color: red; }' }\); console.log\(typeof p, Object.keys\(p\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const ag = require\('ag-grid-community'\); const t = ag.themeQuartz; const params = t._getModeParams\('light'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(params\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('header'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const ag = require\('ag-grid-community'\); const t = ag.themeQuartz.withParams\({}\); console.log\('ok'\);")

Bash(node -e "const ag = require\('ag-grid-community'\); const keys = Object.keys\(ag\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('rowstyle'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('rowclass'\)\); console.log\(keys\);")
Bash(node -e "const ag = require\('ag-grid-community'\); const keys = Object.keys\(ag\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('row'\)\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0,30\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {themeQuartz} = require\('ag-grid-community'\); const t = themeQuartz.withParams\({}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(require\('ag-grid-community'\)\).filter\(k => k.includes\('createPart'\) || k.includes\('Part'\)\)\);")
